dailyPlan.miniUpsell: Let Premium pick 3 lessons for you

sage.reflectQ1: 1. What did this teaching make you feel?
sage.reflectQ2: 2. Where does this show up in your life right now?
sage.reflectQ3: 3. What would change if you lived this for a week?
sage.commitPrompt: How will you do this today?
sage.doneSub: +30 XP · Carry this with you today.

character.maxed: You have reached the highest form.

beginner.title: Beginner
beginner.sub: The journey just started. Every day you choose, you become.

apprentice.title: Apprentice
apprentice.sub: Three days in. The flame is no longer accident — it's choice.

warrior.title: Warrior
warrior.sub: Two weeks. The hard part is past. Now you sharpen.

monk.title: Monk
monk.sub: Thirty days. The old self is gone. The disciplined self walks.

sage.title: Sage
sage.sub: One hundred days. You no longer push the path. The path walks with you.

legend.title: Legend
legend.sub: One year. Few reach here. You did.

dd10.title: First Climb
dd10.body: Ten days on. The phone is quieter. Your hands are starting to remember the feel of nothing.

dd20.title: The Fog Lifts
dd20.body: Twenty days. The cravings still come — but now you see them coming. That's everything.

dd30.title: Forge the Mind
dd30.body: Thirty days. The old loop has died. Something else lives in its place now. Don't look back.

dd40.title: Roar
dd40.body: Forty days. You used to flinch at silence. Now you find it.

dd50.title: Master of the Hours
dd50.body: Fifty days. The dopamine fast is no longer a fast. It's how you live. The path is yours.

sm10.title: Dawn's First Edge
sm10.body: Ten mornings won. The world is yours before anyone else wakes.

sm20.title: The Sacred Hour
sm20.body: Twenty days. Coffee no longer triggers urgency. Quiet does.

sm30.title: Above the Clouds
sm30.body: Thirty mornings. You see the day before it begins. Few do.

sm40.title: Inner Fire
sm40.body: Forty days. The morning isn't a discipline anymore — it's a need.

sm50.title: Sunlight Master
sm50.body: Fifty mornings. You no longer wait for light. You bring it.

md10.title: Sharpening
md10.body: Ten days inside your own head and you didn't run. Most never make it.

md20.title: Locked In
md20.body: Twenty days. The noise is still loud. But you found a quieter room.

md30.title: Storm Eye
md30.body: Thirty days. Chaos around — order within. You learned the trick.

md40.title: Blade Honed
md40.body: Forty days. Your attention now is a weapon. Use it on what matters.

md50.title: Still Mind
md50.body: Fifty days. The mind that runs you is now the mind you run.

bd10.title: First Mile
bd10.body: Ten days. The body that was idle now moves. Small, but real.

bd20.title: Built Foundation
bd20.body: Twenty days. The mirror starts to lie to you in a better way.

bd30.title: The Climb
bd30.body: Thirty days. Sleep is heavier. Hunger is honest. Strength is here.

bd40.title: Armor Forged
bd40.body: Forty days. The body you walk in is not the one you started with.

bd50.title: Sky Eyes
bd50.body: Fifty days. You moved. The reward is who you are now.

mn10.title: First Seed
mn10.body: Ten days. You spent less than you earned ten times in a row. That's how forests start.

mn20.title: Roots Down
mn20.body: Twenty days. Money once ran through your fingers. Now it stays.

mn30.title: Temple Built
mn30.body: Thirty days. The discipline of saying no is the discipline of getting rich.

mn40.title: Balance Held
mn40.body: Forty days. You no longer fear the bill. The bill respects you.

mn50.title: Wealth Mind
mn50.body: Fifty days. You earn the same. You keep more. That difference is freedom.

profile.title: You
profile.identitySub: The paths you finish shape who you are. You are now:
profile.subtitle: AT THE START

streakFreeze.savedBody: You missed yesterday but a streak repair token kept your streak alive. You have {{count}} tokens left.

search.title: Search lessons
search.helpText: At least 2 letters — matches title, teaching, or action text.
search.noResults: No results. Try a different word.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.intro: Top 50 disciplined users by current streak. Ranking is anonymous — real identities are never shared.
leaderboard.emptyBody: Complete your first lesson to enter the leaderboard.

insights.title: Stats
insights.subtitle: Your journey, in numbers. Discipline made tangible.
insights.upsellBody: Weekly trends, peak performance hours, success correlations.

streak.howWorks: Complete one lesson daily to maintain your streak. Skip a day and it resets.
streak.freezeAvailable: {{count}} available. Auto-used when you skip a day.
streak.freezeEmpty: No freezes yet. Get 3 with Premium.

_hearts_dup._comment: Duplicate hearts block — second-write-wins semantics meant earlier keys were silently shadowed. Renamed so the canonical hearts block above takes effect. Kept as _-prefix for historical reference.
_hearts_dup.outSubtitle: Need a heart to continue. Watch an ad for +1 or go Premium.

reflections.title: My Reflections
reflections.subtitle: Thoughts you wrote on past lessons. Look back, remember your journey.
reflections.emptyBody: As you complete lessons, your reflections will collect here.

cold_water.title: Cold Water Shock
cold_water.body: Take a 30-second cold shower or splash cold water on your face today.

phone_free_hour.title: Phone-Free Hour
phone_free_hour.body: Keep your phone in another room for one hour today.

walk_15.title: Walk 15 Minutes
walk_15.body: Walk outside for 15 minutes today, no phone.

pushup_20.title: 20 Push-Ups
pushup_20.body: Do 20 push-ups today (split into sets if needed).

water_2l.title: 2 Liters of Water
water_2l.body: Drink 2 liters of water today. Keep a visible bottle.

no_sugar.title: Sugar-Free Day
no_sugar.body: No added sugar today — fruit excluded.

read_10.title: 10 Pages of a Book
read_10.body: Read 10 pages from any book today.

breath_478.title: 4-7-8 Breath
breath_478.body: Inhale 4 sec, hold 7 sec, exhale 8 sec. 4 repetitions.

sun_5.title: Morning Sunlight
sun_5.body: Get 5 minutes of sunlight within an hour of waking up.

no_scroll.title: Zero Scroll
no_scroll.body: No TikTok / Reels / Shorts today. Just one day.

tidy_5.title: 5-Minute Tidy
tidy_5.body: Tidy the messiest spot in your room in 5 minutes.

gratitude_3.title: 3 Gratitudes
gratitude_3.body: Write down 3 things you're grateful for today.

plank_60.title: 60-Second Plank
plank_60.body: Hold a plank for 60 seconds in one set.

no_complaint.title: Complaint-Free Day
no_complaint.body: Don't complain about anyone or anything today.

compliment.title: Real Compliment
compliment.body: Give a thoughtful, genuine compliment to someone you know.

eye_contact.title: Eye Contact
eye_contact.body: Hold eye contact one extra second with everyone you talk to today.

wallet_audit.title: Wallet Audit
wallet_audit.body: Review your last 7 days of spending. Find one unnecessary purchase.

silent_meal.title: Silent Meal
silent_meal.body: Eat one meal without phone / TV / podcast.

unsub_1.title: Unsubscribe from One
unsub_1.body: Unsubscribe from 1 spam email list in your inbox.

morning_quiet.title: Quiet Morning
morning_quiet.body: First 30 minutes of your morning: no phone, no music, just you.

pomodoro_2.title: 2 Pomodoros
pomodoro_2.body: Do 2 × 25 minutes of uninterrupted focused work today.

cold_call.title: Make That Call
cold_call.body: Make the phone call you've been postponing — now.

one_decision.title: One Decision
one_decision.body: Resolve one decision you've been postponing today.

zero_inbox.title: Inbox Zero
zero_inbox.body: Clear your email / message inbox today — reply, delete, or archive.

gym_show_up.title: Just Show Up
gym_show_up.body: Just go to the gym — what you do doesn't matter, showing up does.

sleep_early.title: 30 Minutes Earlier
sleep_early.body: Sleep 30 minutes earlier than usual tonight.

send_thank.title: Thank-You Message
send_thank.body: Write a 'thank you' to someone who helped you in the past year.

review_yesterday.title: Review Yesterday
review_yesterday.body: Spend 5 minutes writing about yesterday: what went well, what you missed.

weekend_warrior.title: Weekend Warrior
weekend_warrior.description: Keep your streak through a weekend
